reviews.review_text: Recently stayed on a wimm, we needed somewhere to stay last minute, with our new caravan, they took us with no issues with our dog aswell, wonderful service, nice place, woman's amenities were lovely and clean, big clean  park, would stay again

I stayed a long weekend camping with my best friend. We were booked on site 16 which unfortunately was not suitable for swag set up due to rocks I went to reception and the amazing young lady was so happy to help me get onto a site that would suit us site 23 great site for tents and swags. The shower/toilets are beautiful and clean. Camp kitchen was easy to access and clean. Great location if staying with kids as Australia Zoo is only 500 metres down the road.

Again beautiful quite spot and amazing Staff 😊
Wonderful cabins with a beautiful view!
Nice getaway to visit Australia zoo

Perfect distance if you are heading to Australia Zoo. 4 mins away.
Amenities are kept relatively clean, grounds are kept well. Staff were lovely and super helpful.
Was lovely to see a stall with jams, preserves, sauces on the Friday we were there. Stocked up on them!

We stayed 2 nights and had a great time. Amenities were clean and convenient, kitchen had all a family could need. The powered sites were spacious. The campsite is within a wooded area, felt nice to be in a natural surrounding and the kids loved the ducks and turtles in the pond and the firepit. Would visit again.
excellent dog friendly park , fantastic staff . top relaxing setting . highly recommend ,generous sites easy access
a super friendly reception, it was very quiet and very pleasant, toilets and shower clean, the proximity to Australia Zoo was also interesting for us, I would check in here again at any time
This is a great park. I will definitely come back.
Lovely rooms in a great location, with courtesy shuttle bus to Australia Zoo
I had a pleasant experience living here. It was safe and secure. But there was some lewd behavior from the near by residents. Walking around butt naked and doing indecent things in a public space.
Friendly park with good sized camping sites. Staying longer than anticipated due to very wet weather!
We had a lovely stay and will definitely be back. All staff were very friendly and helpful. All amenities we needed and great location for the zoo

Great little park surrounded by trees, plenty of room for a larger van. Clean ammenities, friendly staff.
Hoping to return sometime

I booked a solo holiday trip in the superior garden view 1 bedroom cabin for 4 nights in early January 2026. For a solo holiday, it was the perfect little cabin to come back to after each day of sightseeing around the area. Great value and will recommend this holiday park to others who journey this way.

Will definitely be booking this place again in the future when I journey up this way.

Hi LHP team, we recently had a week stay for a Sunny Coast cricket carnival. On arrival the groundman mowed into a cricket oval and cricket pitch so the kids could get stuck in. Powered sites are very generous for room and the numerous camp kitchens provided all the required facilities. We called through later in the week about a few extra families for a team BBQ one night. The LHP team encouraged the celebrations and even did an extra clean of the camp kitchen facilities. Had a great stay and hope we end up there again next year.

We arrived after 10hr drive little disappointed. A lot of permanent residents there what good.
But permanent resident were verbal abusing us and any who drove in the entry gates.
The cabin was so little for family of 4. Only 2 seater lounge no chairs for kids sit inside.
The stove top didn’t work. (Tried all week call them due busy scheduled we gone before open and back at close time)
What pictures were shown to what we got was little disappointed 😞.
If no kids would been ok in cabin. Took young kid for walk as he was going stir crazy in such little space and permanent residents weren’t happy he was just running.

If got kids with adhd, autism or anything were they make noise this place not recommended.

If just you and your partner or friend get away it be ok.
The caravan side seems pretty ok from what I seen on my walk kids were able be free.

Pool super small and no play ground area for kids.

The site was pleasant and well equipped, with both power and water available. The kitchen was well stocked, though quite small. The laundry facilities were good, the toilets clean, and the showers spacious. Overall, the campsite is rather small, but functional and comfortable.
Theres nothing there and the pool is tiny and old looks like tge paints all coming off it, not inviting at all and over priced

A brilliant park in a convenient location! Really nice sites, with a lovely outlook over the duck pond, which provides some entertainment for the little ones. The park is located close to everything the coast has to offer. 20 minutes in each direction, and you'll find everything you need. Shops close by, along with plenty of places to eat. The toilets could do with refurbishment and a deep clean. The highlight of the stay was the lovely community garden, run by the local residents. If you're there in the afternoons, the residents open up their community stall, with the most incredible jams, sauces and some fresh produce, all grown/made by the residents..

Stayed here while visiting Queensland
4x4 and rooftop tent.
Very relaxed and quiet atmosphere
Great facilities too

Stayed for 25 nights (in our caravan with 2 cats)  before and over the Christmas period visiting family.  Staff very friendly and accommodating.  The park is lovely, with lots of trees and a lagoon.  We loved feeding the ducks, water birds, eels and water dragons.  The park is close to Australia Zoo, Landsborough shops, and not too far to Beerwah or Caloundra. Will definitely stay again next time when we visit family.
Caravan park ok.  Amenities ok. Nothing to rave about.

The position of the park is beside a major intersection, and while traffic noise itself isn't too bad, the hoons on bikes and in cars destroy the serinity. The park's roads badly need repair, as do the amenities.

Es war eine unglaubliche, einmalige Erfahrung in solch einem wunderschönen Hotel mit Geschichte, toller, einmaliger Kunst, wundervollem Personal, eigener Butler für ein paar Tage in diese Welt einzutauchen.|Herzlichen Dank für die tolle  Erfahrung, wir kommen sehr gerne wieder.
Nice little park stayed there for a couple of nights nice and clean amenities were clean managers where great would stay again would recommend cheers mal

Such a gem of a place, beautiful quiet spot which is not far from all the major tourist spots including  Australia Zoo and Glasshouse Mountains.
Beautiful clean spacious amenities and friendly receptionist. Just disappointed that we could only stay 1 night so make sure you book as it's not a huge park. We will definitely recommend staying here.
The cabin was perfect for what I needed~ clean, well appointed and easily accessible. The park has a good vibe and the location was on point. Will definitely come back again! Thank you 🙏

Sehr Uriger und Wilder Caravan Park. Schön in der Natur gelegen mit kleinem See und Wildtieren. Sanitäranlagen sind OK der Pool ist etwas zu klein für die Anlage. Stellplätze mit und ohne Betonplatten vorhanden. Der Zoo ist auch nur einen Steinwurf entfernt.

Stayed here recently for a couple of nights & the park was beautiful with clean modern cabins a nice view of the pond lots of beautiful birds & water dragons. The permanent residents gardens are beautiful nice quiet park for a couple nights rest while travelling through and visiting Australia zoo which is only 2 minutes away.

Excellent bathroom & toilet facilities SO CLEAN
Great laundry kitchen- sink fridge very clean neat & tidy
Would give this park a 10 if I could

Beautiful, clean and spacious. Had everything we needed for a family stay|The cabin we stayed in was spacious, very clean and came with all of the amenities we could need.|We had a small 2 burner stove top (I wish I knew before!) a microwave and a full size fridge. We were provided pots and pans, sharp knives for cutting, a strainer, mixing bowl, peeler, tongs, cups, glasses, a toaster and kettle, and generously given some tea and coffee which were very appreciated! The staff were extremely kind and understanding of my mix up when booking and were happy to help however they could.|The only negative (and I really had to think hard to find one) was the gravel between the cabins isn't very suitcase friendly. With a family of 5 we had plenty of luggage.|Apart from that super minor inconvenience, the entire stay was beautiful and welcoming.

Amazing Holiday Park, The staff are awesome and look after the place.
Clean bathrooms, close to Australia Zoo and the camp kitchen is really good. The view of the lake is nice with plenty of wildlife to watch

This review is not about the Park it self, it is about following their own the cancelation policy and the service. |Unfortunately we had to cancel hour trip including the stay of 2 nights in Landsborough Holiday Park. after several mails and calls, there was a conformation of the cancelation and the message about the refund.  Now weeks later still no money receipt, and also no reaction anymore.|So if there is a risk that you have to cancel your stay, do not go here. This was the only place  where we did not get the refund and had this bad service.

This review is not about the Park it self, it is about following their own the cancelation policy and the service.
Unfortunately we had to cancel hour trip including the stay of 2 nights in Landsborough Holiday Park. after several mails and calls, there was a conformation of the cancelation and the message about the refund.  Now weeks later still no money receipt, and also no reaction anymore.
So if there is a risk that you have to cancel your stay, do not go here. This was the only place  where we did not get the refund and had this bad service.
Omg 😲 how Lovely 😍 👌 👍 🥰 ☺️
Great little park. Spent 4 nights in the camper trailer. Kids loved exploring the creek right next to camp.

We stayed for 3 nights camp tent site with family.
Pros: location close to the nature and amenities. Friendly staff. Small but tidy camp kitchen and toilets. Pet friendly.
Cons: All sites are gravel and road-base no turf. Did not enjoy staying in the tent specially when it felt like a construction site. Needs a drill bit for the pegs.

Go there if you got a caravan or a motor home. Not for tent.
Beautiful and very peaceful park with lots of wildlife. And very convenient if going to Australia Zoo with a shuttle bus pick-up.

Has gotten mouldy in showers not cleaned as much since no longer ingenua
I cleaned laundry emptied bins and swept floor
Filthy in corners

Terrible . The pond /Lake was discusting full of midgies and smell was sickening. Birds & ducks pooping under our awning. Was promised a nice site when booked 4 mths in advance , told  in check in , there were 2 new managers since we booked and site was changed . Plus we booked for 8 mths and left after 3 . Never stay again .
I do work out here but been in homes. Lovely friendly people at reception. Good location.
Lovely community style welcoming caravan park. Some permanent sites, some holiday sites, cabins. Ablutions are clean and hot water is hot. Walking distance to Landsborough town and train station.
We had such a great experience thanks to the friendly and helpful staff! They went above and beyond to make our work function scavenger hunt a successful event. Highly recommend!
We stayed in a 2 bedroom villa.  Was clean, tidy and comfortable.  Location was excellent for visiting Australia Zoo. Very friendly staff.
Lovely spot with pond, caravan sites are nice, drive through sites available

Had a wonderful overnight stay here in one of the cabins. Was travelling through Queensland and had to arrange accommodation with short notice, and the staff at Landsborough Holiday Park were very helpful with sorting it out for me.
Too spot . Great staff
Great quiet little park facilities are lovely and clean well maintained had our caravan here for a few weeks will be back
Best place i have stayed
Beautiful green and excellent location

It was an absolute joke this place!
We had booked an unpowered site for $55 which is completely overpriced for what we got.
They gave us a muddy parking slot right by the pond where there are supposed to be parking slots for 2 cars - absolutely ridiculous! We parked on both of them to have enough space and not fall into the water.
The facilities were okay but have seen better for sure.
The only positive thing was the lady on the phone - she was nice.

But still would never go back there for that price and also not recommend it to anyone if you expect a nice campsite.

Very pretty little park. We had a great site. But it stinks like the pond we were near. I felt really unwell most of our stay as I couldn't get past the turtle and duck dropping smell. Apart from a few rain days, this was a motivated to leave early. Other sites probably would be better, but I could smell it everywhere.
Their laundry was expensive, $7 a load and another $5 to dry. There is a laundromat that is cheaper in town.
You also need to have $1 coins and the cash to buy the coins from the front office, no eftpos for coin.
The toilets and showers were cleanish.
The park itself was very tidy. We never used all the amenities, but the camp kitchen looked well equipped and even had a gas fired pizza oven.
Great stay. Nice and quiet

I would have given 5 stars should the cost have been $45.  $48 a night for a van site is a bit too expensive.  Our stay however was very nice with a little lake that we backed on to complete with ducks and birdlife.  There was a smell at times that wasn't pleasant.  We thought it was bats but we didn't see any.  The staff were friendly.
Lovely setting with the pond in the middle of the park. Facilities overall are clean and tidy.
Great little secluded park a real cabin in the woods
Very good

Very well appointed camp ground with great facilities. Everything was always clean and the camp kitchens were very handy.
Staff were exceedingly friendly, helpful and accommodating.
Relatively close to good beaches and lots to do, see and eat nearby.
We enjoyed our stay and will definitely be back.

We stayed here for 4 days leading up to New Years Eve. We were very happy with the location and found Ingenia to be quiet, well looked after, the cabin we stayed in was as described in the photos and very clean. Arrival was smooth and easy and we would definitely stay here again next time.

1st time staying here & we will definitely be back. Peaceful setting amongst the trees. Our site had a little creek running behind it. Plenty of room, clean facilities. Great water pressure in the shower. Friendly staff. Central location to explore the Sunshine coast beaches or glass house mountains.
So loved staying in the holiday park

Ingenia Holidays Landsborough is a gorgeous place to stay. It has beautiful and tranquil gardens; duck ponds and surrounds that are very well maintained. The manager and all staff are friendly, available and extremely helpful. The location cannot be faulted with this park in the historic town of Landsborough and so close to Australia Zoo and many other attractions.
Small campground with a great camping kitchen and clean facilities. Very quiet but very close to the zoo.
So impressed with the professionalism and customer service.  Really enjoy our stay at the caravan park. Highly recommended
Excellent cabins quiet near the town square good service will be back
One of the best caravan parks we have stayed in. Family friendly, would definitely come back
Staff are very willing to help in seeking  advice, information about local activities and recommendations. Courteous and efficient.

We stayed here to go to Australia Zoo we stayed 3 nights spent 2 days at the zoo, the 2 bedroom cabin was very nice and well kept, clean, comfortable, staff friendly and helpful, lots of wildlife to see in the pond and around, close to zoo. Short walk to shops.

From the receptionist who was one of the friendliest we have encountered in a long time to our perfect drive through site. This is a beautiful tranquil park that has a lovely pond (that is constantly aureate)! Bird life is healthy.
We did not use the facilities, but did inspect. They were lovely and clean and the shower cubical big enough for a party.
Camp kitchens, and a pleasant BBQ area with pizza oven. There is also a communal fire pit. What more can you ask for.
It’s a slice of tranquil paradise that puts you within arms reach of Australian Zoo and the beaches of the Sunshine Coast. Also day visits to the famous Maleny area.
Yep, you guest it! This has now been voted our place to stay when on or near the Sunshine Coast.. also it’s pet friendly!
Keep up the great work to all that are evolved with the running of this park.
Fantastic place to stay, facilities are brilliant, the staff were very nice, it was the young lady's second day and she was very helpful. Had an enjoyable time. Thank you.

This park has huge potential, location & it's ambience are it's strong points, just needs upgrading work on roads, amenities & swimming pool.
Just a short walk into the lovely township.

Lovely, tidy, clean and spacious cabin. Comfortable beds. It was advertised as a Big 4/Ingenia Holiday destination but the majority of the park is permanent residents. Don't feel 100% comfortable in this situation. Feels a bit like I'm staying in someone's back yard. Luckily, we were only there for 2 nights and had somewhere nice to sleep. No catering whatsoever to kids, so if you have active kids and you're not planning a day at Aussie World, you're best to avoid this place. The pool was clean but desperately in need of an upgrade. Also, not all that appreciative of the repeative contact about our ETA, but we did have a seamless check in after hours. Was a pleasant overnighter but useless as a holiday park.
Amenities a bit run down needs an upgrade otherwise ok.
Clean rooms, friendly service, fair pricing and the location is perfect for Australia Zoo
Lovely to camp..friendly they have all you need..close to australian zoo..
Lovely little park in a quiet location only meters from Steve Irwin Way. Great little shopping centre about 500 m from the front gate. Little creek runs asking the back of the caravan sites
Affordable price with every amenities you need in the cabin. Will come back again. Service was brilliant.
Comfortable enough but for me the bunk bed mattress was a little hard.  Staff are great.

Very easy, straightforward and friendly check-in. I was greeted by a young lady who was warm, friendly, helpful and very informative of local activities and services. We checked into the Ducks Hollow 2 bedroom cabin. The cabin was super spacious, modern and comfortable. The grounds were soggy to walk on, but there had been recent downpours of rain. The cabin had a balcony with a table and two chairs which had a lovely view of the lake. The park was very close to Landsborough, about 5 minutes away from Australia Zoo, and 10 minutes to Beerwah. The kitchen was well stocked with all essentials required to cook meals, although a larger frypan would have been helpful. The cabin was large, clean and well looked after. The park was quiet, clean and tidy. It seems that it was predominantly permanent sites, but this didn't bother us at all. A maintenance note was left for the main bedroom door, but maybe some extra space for towel hanging would be helpful. We would definitely stay here again! Thank you for a wonderful stay.

Just spent 10 days in this beautiful caravan park.  Mostly full of permanent vans  but where we stayed had a lovely view of the lagoon. Every morning & evening we were greeted by the birdlife that resides in the park & u can purchase food from reception to feed them. Just up the road from Australia Zoo & within driving distance to the villages in the Hinterland. Would highly recommend this park & will stay here again.

Good park, well run. Only 3 km
from Australia zoo. Easy walk into a nice town

Pretty disappointed in basic communication from this place. Last week I was sent a invoice for 4 years ago. Causing intense trauma not just for the fact most of us don’t have money for surprise bills ( sent in error and blamed on a system update) I explained why this traumatised me being the last family holiday I had with my kids before one was killed in accident. To read only yesterday your place doesn’t take safety seriously is another reason for this feedback. I have been ignored by email simply asking for my details to be removed from their system to prevent things like this causing trauma again. Only email I have received was blaming the system. Take some accountability it goes a long way for business as well as giving customers the simple basic customer service skills by acknowledging their issues not ignoring them. Absolutely appalling

Campsite would be a 3 star rating at best, everything very average, apart from the service which was pretty poor. Paid for a double powered campsite, couldn’t get power. Told them at the office about the issue, was told the handyman would check. Received a text saying the power had been checked, one socket works but don’t use the other (already not ideal when 2 vehicles required power). The one that apparently worked, only worked for around 20 mins before tripping out. Went to see the office again upon leaving just to recommend that the power outlet is looked at properly as it’s potentially dangerous, they didn’t seem bothered nor did they offer any kind of compensation for our 2 nights without power. Pretty poor from a big campsite like this, a simple issue that could have been rectified, but dealt with poorly, would not stay again.

Excellent all round :)
bathrooms
service
location
All great :)
Beautiful park! Clean facilities and super friendly staff. Only 5 mins from Australia Zoo. Our favourite stop so far :)
Nice place to stay while visiting the Australian Zoo.  Plenty of wildlife around the cabins.

We stayed on a unpowered site which was clean, quiet and level (which you don't normally get). The office left us the map and details for the site in a outside box as we were arriving late which were easy to follow. The site was really quiet and the facilities were clean with a great shower. Good value for money!
Nice and clean accommodation

Beautiful camp site right next to a big duck pond and surrounded by the forest. If your going to the zoo they have a 10% discount for all their guest and it's a 5min drive to to zoo, they also have a shuttle bus to the zoo and back.
Totally recommend this place to unwind and the pool after a hole day walking visiting the zoo.
The staff are lovely and are happy to help.
We will be back here!

Unfortunately the permanent residents ruined this one for us. We were over ruled and didn’t feel like we could really enjoy our caravan park because of this. The only paved space for our kids to ride scooters was in the permanent area, and when we did so, the residents told us we weren’t welcomed, to get away. Our kids got scooters from Santa so we’re excited to go away, and to ride them but couldn’t in the rocky ground that was the camp sites. The facilities and the staff were lovely however. And the location is great, near so many activities. But the overall experience for us wasn’t great. Our kids made friends with other campers kids and they were running around in the day time being kids and they kept coming back upset saying “old people are going to the office to make a complaint!”. It was sad for us as all other caravan parks we have visited where our kids make friends and go off and ride their scooters, swim and play etc. We didn’t feel we could enjoy ourselves this time.
Fantastic place to stay and definitely be going back when travelling in this area
Lovely place to stay
Stayed in caravan park. Quiet yet very handy to Zoo, Caloundra and Montville.
The cabins were great plenty of space for 2 adults and 2 kids. Ducks and wildlife around to feed that live in the pond highly recommend
Great stop the night before the zoo
Great place to visit for a quite getaway
Nice spot very helpful girl on the desk went out of her way to help us.shes worth more money

We stayed in one of the cabins and there were a few things that made our stay no so great. There is no WIFI as advertised. The hot water kept cutting off, up to four times in ten minutes so showers were terrible. My allergies flared up badly due to the amount of dust in the cabin and it was confirmed when we checked under the bed and saw a layer of dust underneath. The cabin smelled awful! Particularly the couch and the curtains let off a pungent BO smell. Trains honking through the night so it isn't a peaceful location. And lastly, most of the place is taken up by permanent residents, mainly seniors. It felt like we were holidaying in a retirement village.

It had everything we needed and it was livable but just not up to standard. The price should definitely be lower for what you get i feel ripped off honestly.
Close to Landsborough shopping centre. Powered sites small. Advised staff that a butcher bird was swooping people and drew blood on my husband's head but they didn't seem to care.
We stayed in one of the cabins which was very comfortable and had everything we needed. We had a lovely outlook onto the pond. There was also a back balcony that was lovely and peaceful.

My wife and I stayed here for 4 nights in October. We stayed in the Possums 1 bedroom villa for 2 nights and the Daintree 1 bedroom villa for 2 nights. The accommodation is clean and basic but served our needs and was central to the places we wished to see. The layout was a bit strange with toilet opening straight onto a small kitchen, where as it should be off the bedroom with a sliding door. The photos online make it look much bigger than it is. The kitchen is small with little bench space the oven and stove were functional but pretty old. The bedroom was nice and the bed was comfortable and we had a good nights sleep. The lounge is nice enough and there are outside decks off the bedroom and front. The bathroom had a toilet and shower and was clean and functional. The surroundings are nice and parking is right outside the accommodation. There is a coin operated laundry on site, and a swimming pool that we did not have time to use. We had a pleasant stay and would recommend to travelers who were looking for basic clean accommodation at a reasonable price. The staff were very friendly and helpful, and check in and out was quick and easy.
We had a great unpowered site, which was quiet and we were able to hook up to water for our stay.

First impression park needs money spent on it especially the pool area but once settled in the place became a little slice of nature. Relaxing and everything you need. Watching the 10 or more ducklings being looked after by the older ducks was amuzing. Would come again. Good base to drive to Malany ect.
But yes would like to see pool area improved on.

Petit camping propre et un peu équipé mais proche de la voie ferrée donc un peu bruyant et chère pour les prestations 52$ pour 2 avec un van et l’électricité. Il y une mare avec beaucoup d’oiseaux mais aussi des moustiques. Majorité d’emplacement résidentiel dans ce camping.
Great site near Australia's Zoo, easy walk into town too (good food and pubs in Ealing distance). We arrived late, but everything was ready and prepared for us, thankyou!
Wonderful service from staff, cabins were tidy, well-equipped and  as advertised. 10/10 would recommend.
Lovely place to camp, the cleaniest amenties block, close to nearby attractions. The pool does need renovating though.

Camping sites are fairly good size.
Bathroom has nice shower rooms with a bench.
Kitchen is ok. The oven/stove is currently broken. It has a microwave, kettle, and toaster.
Quiet and clean park. Lots of bird life and an easy walk into town.
Great stay and beautiful caravan park and staff are very helpful

A lovely pet friendly park.

Incredibly impressed with this park, immaculate amenities, family friendly and good use of space.

I will say the rooster next door was a downside but that's not their fault!

Fantastic service, thank you to Shannon who helped with my booking. The cabin was very clean and very comfortable. You had everything you needed great animenties. Beautiful surroundings and was quiet at night. Very close to the shops, bus and train service if needed. All and all it was a last minute booking for me and very glad I chose them.
I love staying there it is very peaceful and quite

I feel the common areas could do with a bit more cleaning. Main kitchen is a tiny bit too small for the amount of camper spaces.

Otherwise the location is absolutely beautiful, the little pond is just wow. Nature is on fire.

Reception staff so friendly, sweet and welcoming.

We camped so we cannot comment on the cabins :)

I am so sorry to say that our time was cut short. WE left, with no sleep for the 2 nights we did stay, due to trains honking all night and lyre birds calling/singing. I am even sadder to say that the facilities were not clean, No hand soap was filled for our entire stay, I waited for the floors to be cleaned, then arrived just after and found the mop filthy, the floors had been 'swished' with a dirty  mop, the dirt rubbed into the tile grooves and visible throughout the facilities. I was appalled to see used toilet paper had been swished along the toilet floor but not picked up. I had high hopes as the greeting staff were amazing, thank you Shannon.

We haven't even arrived yet but the staff over the phone have been so lovely and helpful with bookings and info, etc.  Nothing has been too much trouble.  If this is a hint of the service we will get when we arrive then we are sure we will have a wonderful time there.  We are really looking forward to our trip.

Great little park,we stayed on a powered site with concrete slab.|The amenities as in showers and toilets are very clean and the hot water excellent.|We didn't use the laundry but it looked in great order. $4 wash or dry.|The BBQs area and firepit both great for a sit around. We thought the lack of cooking as in stove top and oven not working wasn't real good but it was only for the night I am confident that will be rectified.|The staff when booking and checking in were outstanding, they couldn't do enough for you they were so kind friendly and hospitable.|Overall we enjoyed the stay. |Thank you
From the first phone call to driving in was such a great experience   this sort of service is what makes this country great 👍
Very tidy.
Needs to put in Wi fi  blinds need to be cleaned

We were here for a night on a powered slab. Friendly staff at the check-in. The site itself was fine and so were the amenities. The small size of the park probably helps to maintain a calm atmosphere here. We enjoyed our stay here.
Super Campingplatz
